military_bases.name: Al Udeid Air Base
military_bases.notes: Largest US air base in the Middle East; home of AFCENT and Combined Air Operations Center

military_bases.name: NSA Bahrain (5th Fleet)
military_bases.notes: HQ of US 5th Fleet and NAVCENT; primary Gulf naval hub

military_bases.name: Al Dhafra Air Base
military_bases.notes: Key ISR, tanker, and stealth aircraft hub; hosts U-2, RQ-4, and F-35

military_bases.name: Incirlik Air Base
military_bases.notes: NATO nuclear weapons site; major power projection base for EUCOM/CENTCOM corridor

military_bases.name: RAF Akrotiri
military_bases.notes: UK Sovereign Base Area; critical ISTAR hub for eastern Mediterranean and Levant

military_bases.name: Prince Sultan Air Base
military_bases.notes: Al-Kharj; major US hub in Saudi Arabia; hosts Patriot, F-35, and air superiority assets

military_bases.name: Muwaffaq Salti Air Base
military_bases.notes: Az-Zarqa; forward US F-16 presence; important Levant staging base

military_bases.name: Camp Lemonnier
military_bases.notes: Only permanent US base in Africa; key AFRICOM hub for Red Sea/Horn ops; MQ-9 operations

military_bases.name: Nevatim Air Base
military_bases.notes: Primary IAF F-35 (Adir) base; major strategic airlift and combat hub

military_bases.name: King Abdullah II Air Base
military_bases.notes: Mafraq; RJAF F-16 base; periodic US and coalition presence

military_bases.name: Al Asad Air Base
military_bases.notes: Major coalition base in Anbar; historically targeted by Iranian ballistic missiles Jan 2020

military_bases.name: Joint Base Balad
military_bases.notes: Major Iraqi Air Force hub; site of frequent ISR and logistics activity

military_bases.name: Al Harir (Erbil) Air Base
military_bases.notes: Coalition forces in Kurdistan Region; frequently used for ISR and logistics

military_bases.name: Victory Base Complex
military_bases.notes: Adjacent to Baghdad International Airport; major logistics and advisory hub

military_bases.name: Minhad Air Base
military_bases.notes: UAE Air Force hub near Dubai; Australian, New Zealand, and UK forces have operated here

military_bases.name: Ahmed Al Jaber Air Base
military_bases.notes: Southern Kuwait; secondary US and coalition aviation hub

military_bases.name: Masirah Air Base
military_bases.operator: Royal Air Force of Oman / US access
military_bases.notes: Island base; historically used by USAF for Gulf and Indian Ocean operations

military_bases.name: Thumrait Air Base
military_bases.operator: Royal Air Force of Oman / US access rights
military_bases.notes: Remote desert base; used by USAF in multiple Gulf conflicts; MQ-9 and tanker hub

military_bases.name: Diyarbakir Air Base
military_bases.operator: Turkish Air Force / US ISR detachment
military_bases.notes: Eastern Turkey; key ISR platform operating base for Syria and Iraq surveillance

military_bases.name: King Abdulaziz Air Base
military_bases.notes: Dhahran; RSAF Eastern Province hub adjacent to major oil infrastructure

military_bases.name: Al Tanf Garrison
military_bases.notes: 55km deconfliction zone at Iraq-Syria-Jordan border; small but strategically sensitive

military_bases.name: Rmeilan Airfield
military_bases.notes: NE Syria; coalition forward operating location supporting anti-ISIS operations

military_bases.name: Camp Arifjan
military_bases.notes: Primary US Army logistics and pre-positioning hub in Kuwait

military_bases.name: Ali Al Salem Air Base
military_bases.notes: Forward operating base; A-10 and ISR operations during Iraq conflicts

military_bases.name: Camp Buehring
military_bases.notes: Training and staging camp in northern Kuwait

military_bases.name: Taji Military Complex
military_bases.notes: North Baghdad; NATO Mission Iraq training hub; targeted by rocket attacks 2020

military_bases.name: Souda Bay Naval Base
military_bases.notes: Crete; key eastern Mediterranean P-8 and ISR hub; logistic staging for Levant operations

military_bases.name: King Faisal Air Base
military_bases.notes: Taif; RSAF hub with access from eastern Mediterranean corridor

military_bases.name: Isa Air Base
military_bases.operator: Bahrain Air Force / Royal Air Force
military_bases.notes: Bahrain Air Force primary base; RAF Typhoon detachments; close to NSA Bahrain

military_bases.name: Fujairah Naval Base
military_bases.notes: Outside Strait of Hormuz; strategic positioning for Indian Ocean and Gulf of Oman access

military_bases.name: Tel Nof Air Base
military_bases.notes: IAF C-130, F-16, and training hub; close to Tel Aviv

military_bases.name: Hatzerim Air Base
military_bases.notes: IAF F-16 and advanced training; near Beersheba; also hosts Israeli Air Force Museum

military_bases.name: Q-West Air Base
military_bases.notes: Qayyarah West; used heavily during Mosul offensive; lower activity post-ISIS

military_bases.name: Ramon Air Base
military_bases.notes: New IAF base in Negev; expanding to replace older sites; Mitzpe Ramon area
